description: You are a renewable energy project developer evaluating 'Tehachapi Site Alpha' for a new wind farm. Using the hourly wind dataset at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/nrel_hourly_wind_2023.csv and site constraints at ~/Documents/site_specifications.txt, create a pitch deck of at least 4 slides. Calculate three metrics from the 'Wind_Speed_80m_ms' column: Average Wind Speed, Maximum Wind Speed, and Operational Time Fraction (the percentage of the 8,760 hours where wind speed is between 4.0 and 25.0 m/s inclusive), rounding all values to one decimal place. The presentation must include a title slide for 'Tehachapi Site Alpha', site location details (Parcel ID and Coordinates from the TXT), the calculated wind metrics, and environmental constraints including the specific protected species mentioned in the TXT. Save the final presentation to ~/Documents/Presentations/site_alpha_pitch.pptx.

metadata.data_source: Simulated NREL WIND Toolkit data (8760 hours)
